title: OWYR Adjustable Magnetic Fly Screen Window - DIY Fit Up to 120x130cm, Fiberglass Insect Mesh for Mosquito Net & Bug Screen, Full Frame Magnetic Strip Easy Installation (White Frame Grey Net)
features: ADJUSTABLE SIZE & EASY DIY - Fits windows up to 120x130cm (47"x51"), with a fly screen that can be trimmed to any smaller size. Includes a step-by-step installation video for hassle-free setup. The window screen size may vary by 1-3 cm as minor trimming may be required for a totally fit

UPGRADED FIBERGLASS MESH - Features a window net insect screen with flame-retardant, fireproof, and chemical-resistant properties. Enhanced with magnetic fly screen window strips (750GS) for a secure fit, ensuring no gaps for insects
UNIVERSAL COMPATIBILITY - Works with aluminum/wood/iron window frames, sliding windows, casement windows, shutters, skylights, bathroom/toilet windows, and even caravans or balconies
EFFECTIVE MOSQUITO NET - Window fly screen keeps mosquitoes and insects out while allowing fresh air and sunlight in, ensuring a peaceful sleep day or night. Ideal for homes with kids and pets

NO DRILLING & QUICK INSTALLATION - Uses strong adhesive for a no-drill window screen setup in just 15 minutes, leaving no marks on frames. The window netting for insects is washable, replaceable, and easy to clean with a damp cloth or vacuum
CUSTOMER SATISFACTION - Contact us for any issues, and we’ll ensure you’re satisfied with your fly net for windows
